textPlain: Eureka Labs: https://github.com/EurekaLabsAIWhat a prolific person Andrej is. It's been more than amazing to follow along!

I've always thought about the best way to contribute to humanity: number of people you help x how much you help them. I think what Karpathy is doing is one of the highest leverage ways to achieve that.Our current world is build on top of open source projects. This is possible because there are a lot of free resources to learn to code so anyone from anywhere in the world can learn and make a great piece of software.I just hope the same will happen with the AI/LLM wave.
Wow, how do we sign up for the Eurekalabs course and how much does it cost?
Yes agree. Other high leverage ways are to control culture. Andrew Tate comes to mind.
Karpathy says nanochat will become the capstone project of the course LLM101n being developed by Eureka Labs.I guess it’s still a work in progress? Couldn’t find any other information elsewhere.
